## nsc docker login

Log into the Namespace Cloud private registry for use with Docker.

```
nsc docker login [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help                        help for login
      --output_registry_to string   If specified, write the registry address to this path.
      --use_credential_helper       Use nsc's credential helper instead of embedding the credentials. (default true)
```
